title: Support - App, user not logged ever, login, Continue, login
scenario: Guest user login from Support > App screen results in white screen with spinner instead of displaying correct support card data
steps: 1. Install the Poly Studio Mobile app.
2. Complete onboarding as a Guest user.
5. Complete the login flow on the login page.
6. Observe the screen after login completes.
expected: After login completes, the Support card displays the correct data: App version, tenant name, tenant ID, user ID, app ID, and last connection.
